summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dead Signal P0 features: World Conditions and Economy System. All 40 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend fully operational with all 8 main tabs, World Conditions panel with tooltips, and complete Economy system (Trade Board, Supply Requests, Crafting Planner, Scarcity Index).

Backend: GET /api/world/state - weather valid (clear/cloudy/overcast/rain/storm/fog/snow/blizzard)

Backend: GET /api/world/state - day 1-120 range
Backend: GET /api/world/state - requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/world/override - admin can override weather
Backend: POST /api/world/override - admin can clear weather override
Backend: POST /api/world/override - admin can set time offset
Backend: POST /api/world/override - admin can set custom alert
Backend: POST /api/world/override - requires admin (403 for non-admin)

Backend: POST /api/economy/trades/{id}/respond - claim trade works

Backend: POST /api/economy/trades/{id}/respond - complete trade works
Backend: POST /api/economy/trades/{id}/respond - cancel trade works

Frontend: Login with Commander / DS-NV3F-CQ4Q-STFP-CVGN works
Frontend: Dashboard shows 8 tabs for admin (Overview, Console, Tactical Map, Players, Factions, Economy, Game Master, Admin)

Frontend: World Conditions tooltips appear on hover

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 World Conditions and Economy System fully tested. World state calculates time/weather/season from server uptime with GM override capability. Economy has 25 resources, 10 crafting recipes, trade board with claim/complete/cancel workflow, and supply requests with priority levels. All features working correctly for both admin and player roles. Auto-broadcast toggle present in GM Overview panel.
